refnamediv.refpurpose: Register a moving image to a fixed image.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [registered, transform] = imregister(moving, fixed) [registered, transform] = imregister(moving, fixed, method)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Estimates a translation with phase correlation and returns the registered image together with a homogeneous transform matrix. The current implementation supports the method name phasecorr.

refsection.title: Examples
